title: Warleader
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Warleader''' was a title used by the [[warrior caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. It was an unofficial rank used in two cases—one was for Yuuzhan Vong [[Commander/Legends|Commanders]] who were in charge of a single theater of war, but not yet [[Escalation|escalated]] to [[Supreme Commander (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Supreme Commander]]. Another was for the leaders of simple squadrons and platoons.

Warleader was also the title used by [[Garn (Rakata)|Garn]] as leader of [[the One]]'s warriors.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]''
